About Me

Capturing Moments
That Matter

My name is Olatunde Victor Gbenga — a photographer, photo editor, and graphics designer based in Akure, Nigeria. I specialize in event photography and portrait sessions, capturing real emotion with clarity and intention.

Whether it's the energy of a celebration, the stillness of a portrait, or a bold graphic that speaks without words — I bring a creative eye and technical precision to every project.

What I Do

Services & Expertise

01
Photography

Event coverage, portrait sessions, and candid storytelling. I document your most important moments with an eye for light, composition, and genuine emotion.

02
Photo Editing

Professional color grading, retouching, and enhancement. I transform raw images into polished, publication-ready photographs that reflect your vision.

03
Graphics Design

Flyers, posters, brand visuals, and digital content. Clean, bold, and intentional designs crafted to communicate your message effectively.
